summary: Verified NEW 'Approve & Save to Lead' feature on /bottle-preview end-to-end. Backend endpoints (list/add/replace/delete) and frontend flows (approve-with-no-lead hint, direct save when empty, dialog for existing designs with Add-new/Replace/Cancel, replace-in-place preserves count, delete + empty state, regression: download + logo-size + snap-to-guides) all pass. Test lead was left clean (0 designs).

minor.issue: Invalid image_data (non-base64 payload without 'data:' prefix) is silently accepted with status 200 because base64.b64decode is lenient. Not user-facing but a small validation gap — could add regex check for a valid data URL / stricter b64 validation.

approve_without_lead.approve_no_lead_hint_text: Select a lead at the top to approve & save this design.

select_lead_test_multi_brand_co.gallery_visible_with_empty_state: Saved designs for Test Multi Brand Co (0) — No approved designs yet.

approve_1_direct_save.approve_button_text_updates_to: Approve & Save to Test Multi Brand Co

cases: test_add_first_design — 200, count=1, image_url + clean_url served, GET persists
test_replace_in_place — replace_design_id keeps count, message='Design replaced'
test_delete_design — 200, count decrements, design gone from list
test_add_invalid_image_data — FAIL (returned 200 instead of 400 for garbage payload; minor validation gap)

action_items: Optional (minor): tighten input validation on POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/bottle-designs so obviously non-base64 image_data returns 400 (currently base64.b64decode is lenient and accepts almost any string).
critical_code_review_comments: BottlePreview.js is now ~1830 lines — continue to grow. Recommend extracting LeadSelector, LivePreview, LogoEditingTools, ApproveDialog, DesignsGallery into sub-components (flagged in prior iterations 280/281 too).

handleApproveClick fires two silent successes without a loading indicator on the Approve button between clicks. Consider disabling the button while `approving` is true (currently only the dialog buttons show `disabled={approving}`; the main approve-design-btn does not).

doApproveSave builds the composite from the live DOM. If the user clicks Approve while the DOM is not yet fully painted (e.g., just after selecting a lead), the PNG may be blank. A brief `awaitPaint` / requestAnimationFrame delay could harden this.
test_credentials: CEO surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth / test123 — login token key is `session_token`.
seed_data_creation: None. Used seeded lead Test Multi Brand Co (2c609055-1413-4311-be67-6b0ef1b564e8) which already has a logo on file. All designs created during testing were deleted; lead ends with 0 saved designs (confirmed via GET /api/leads/{id}/bottle-designs → designs=[]).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Approve & Save to Lead feature is fully wired on /bottle-preview. Endpoints: GET/POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/bottle-designs, DELETE /api/leads/{lead_id}/bottle-designs/{design_id}. POST payload accepts image_data (with strip) + clean_data (without), plus metadata + optional replace_design_id (replace-in-place vs append). Frontend testids verified: approve-design-btn, approve-no-lead-hint, approve-dialog, approve-add-new-btn, approve-replace-{id}, approve-cancel-btn, lead-designs-gallery, lead-designs-grid, lead-design-{id}, view-design-{id}, delete-design-{id}. Approve button label dynamically updates to 'Approve & Save to {company}' when a lead is selected. Test lead was cleaned back to 0 designs at teardown.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. One minor validation gap noted (see backend minor issue).
